channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Tuvalu, Libya, Montenegro, and Colombia: How Countries are Cashin' in on Unique Top-Level Domains
item.description: Countries are leveraging their unique top-level domains to generate revenue through web domain registration fees.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: New power delivery tech could save Google, Microsoft tens millions of dollars annually; Vertical PD up to 3KA could enable 10% reduction in losses
item.description: Empower Semiconductor’s new Crescendo vertical power delivery platform could save tech firms tens millions of dollars annually.
item.dc:creator: waynewilliams@onmail.com (Wayne Williams), TechRadar

item.title: Los datos y la seguridad frenan la implantación de la IA en las empresas
item.description: El 84% de los directores de Sistemas de la Información (CIO, por sus siglas en inglés) considera que la inteligencia artificial (IA) será tan relevante para sus negocios como lo fue en su día el auge de Internet. No obstante, sólo el 11% afirma haber implementado completamente esta tecnología.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Hurricane misinformation stokes fears ahead of election
item.description: The flood of conspiracy theories and rumors following the severe weather in the South is sparking concerns that political figures’ embrace of misinformation is just the beginning as the general election draws closer.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Microsoft settles video gamers' lawsuit over Activision takeover
item.description: Microsoft Corp. has settled a lawsuit from a group of gamers who sued to try to stop the company from buying video game publisher Activision Blizzard for $69 billion last year.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: It’s your last day to comment on one of the biggest cybersecurity rules ever
item.description: Final comments on a Defense Department cybersecurity rule are due today. The Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification project is about to become a reality. The post It’s your last day to comment on one of the biggest cybersecurity rules ever first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: Apple powers up the iPad mini for Apple Intelligence
item.description: As expected, Apple has introduced a much faster Apple Intelligence-capable iPad mini equipped with the same A17 Pro chip used in the iPhone 15 Pro series. That’s a good improvement from the A15 Bionic in the previous model, and makes for faster graphics, computation, and AI calculation.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: How to choose a flexible unified SASE solution
item.description: SASE is at the top of all CIOs’ minds, and for good reason. When deployed properly, SASE, which combines SD-WAN with cloud-delivered security via SSE, enables all users and devices, regardless of location, to securely access an organization’s hybrid network.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Tech consultant goes on trial in death of Cash App founder Bob Lee
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The tech consultant charged in Cash App founder Bob Lee's stabbing death had no motive to kill him and in fact was forced to defend himself against Lee, who had become aggressive while on a multiday drug bender, lawyers for Nima Momeni said in opening statements Monday.
item.dc:creator: JANIE HAR, Associated Press, Fox 5
